name: ARES CAPITAL CORP
summary: PART I GENERAL Ares Capital Corporation Ares Capital Corporation, a Maryland corporation (together with its subsidiaries, where applicable, Ares Capital or the Company, which may also be referred to as we, us or our), is a specialty finance company that is a closed-end, non-diversified management investment company.
